description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 54-57.

Level 24

Immortal Challenger

Beginning at 24th level, you can expend 2 Legendary Points as a bonus action to wreathe yourself in the fires of your oath, becoming invulnerable to all damage until the start of your next turn. This effect ends early if you are incapacitated.

For the duration, you gain a fly speed of 60 feet, or increase your existing fly speed by 60 feet if you already have one. Additionally, the first time you use your Divine Smite on that turn, it does not expend a spell slot.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to half your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1), and regain all uses when you finish a long rest.

Improved Legendary Smite

When you reach 24th level, your Legendary Smite’s range is increased to 45 feet. Regardless of whether the attack hits, all creatures in a 10-foot-wide line between you and the target, including the target, must make a Dexterity saving throw against your spell save DC, taking 70 (20d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
